Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: suit of formal clothing, silk hat, handkerchief
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, short black hair, brown eyes, thin build, average-looking features with a deep outline, scholarly air, wearing a linen shirt
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Claims to have lost recent memories (amnesia)
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Described when dressing up to go to Besik Street.

Melissa Moretti.hair_style: long, reaching down to her vest
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: wears a tattered veil cap and carries a self-sewn bag
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: teenage female, pale skin, long wavy black hair, wearing a simple, slightly worn Victorian dress
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Explicitly described when Klein sees her sitting at his desk.

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: black top hat and a black trench coat that reaches his knees
Dunn Smith.face_description: A mature face with a slightly high hairline and deep, abstruse gray eyes. His expression is often calm, sometimes featuring a polite but unusual smile.
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: slightly high hairline, deep gray eyes
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Text explicitly confirms his 'silver-colored eyes' reflecting tranquility

The Fool.face_description: features hidden by mysterious gray fog
The Fool.visual_anchor: A mysterious male figure shrouded entirely in gray fog, acting as the initiator of the secret Gathering.
The Fool.source_notes: Mentioned as the initiator of the mysterious Gathering. Appearance and details are guessed based on context as an enigmatic leader.

Justice.face_description: elegant and refined features hidden by fog
Justice.visual_anchor: A slender young woman in an elegant Victorian dress, shrouded in gray fog during the Gathering.
Justice.source_notes: Mentioned as a member of the Gathering whom Klein consults. Details guessed based on context.

The Hanged Man.face_description: rugged and weathered face hidden by fog
The Hanged Man.visual_anchor: A tall, rugged man in nautical Victorian attire, sitting within the mysterious gray fog.
The Hanged Man.source_notes: Mentioned as a member of the Gathering whom Klein exchanges objects and information with. Details guessed based on context.

Wright.primary_clothing: White linen shirt with rolled sleeves, heavy dark brown leather apron, charcoal trousers
Wright.face_description: Broad face, ruddy cheeks, thick eyebrows, strong square jaw
Wright.visual_anchor: Mid-40s stocky male pub owner, wearing a leather apron over a white shirt, broad face with ruddy cheeks and thick eyebrows
Wright.color_palette: leather brown, off-white, ruddy red, charcoal
Wright.source_notes: The bartender refers to him as 'Old Man' and the text describes him as an 'intoxicated old man'.
